items_flat.title_en: Summer 2026 AI Safety Index finds industry-wide gaps
items_flat.title_zh: 2026 夏季 AI Safety Index 指出全產業安全缺口
items_flat.summary_en: The independent index graded Anthropic highest at C+, followed by OpenAI and Google DeepMind at C, while flagging weaker risk management across the sector.
items_flat.summary_zh: 獨立指數將 Anthropic 評為最高的 C+，OpenAI 與 Google DeepMind 為 C，並指出整體產業風險管理仍有明顯缺口。

items_flat.title_en: Launch-week recap: GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, Muse Spark 1.1, and Fable 5
items_flat.title_zh: 上市週回顧：GPT-5.6、Grok 4.5、Muse Spark 1.1 與 Fable 5
items_flat.summary_en: A dated release tracker summarized an unusually dense week of frontier-model, agent, voice, image, and API launches across the major labs.
items_flat.summary_zh: 按日期整理的發布追蹤回顧前沿實驗室異常密集的一週，涵蓋模型、代理、語音、圖像與 API 更新。
